outputs.label: Post-test probability
outputs.formula: IF(test_result == 1, pre_test_probability * sensitivity * 0.0001 / (pre_test_probability * sensitivity * 0.0001 + (1 - pre_test_probability * 0.01) * (1 - specificity * 0.01)) * 100, pre_test_probability * 0.01 * (1 - sensitivity * 0.01) / (pre_test_probability * 0.01 * (1 - sensitivity * 0.01) + (1 - pre_test_probability * 0.01) * specificity * 0.01) * 100)
